en._note: All bot texts. Edit here and deploy (wrangler imports this file). Keep {placeholders} unchanged.
en.accessDenied: This part of the bot is only open to the hosq team
en.adminBroadcastAlreadySent: This notification has already been sent
en.adminBroadcastComposePrompt: Send the message or media you’d like to share 🧚
en.adminCircleRandomCountPrompt: How many random participants should receive this request?
en.adminSetSchedulePrompt:
Send the schedule text 🌿
This is exactly what people see when they tap Schedule.
en.circleReceivedOk:
Got it ✨
Your circle has arrived safely.
en.circleReminder:
A gentle reminder 🌿
Your Notations circle is still waiting for you.
en.circleRequestBody:
A small moment from your day 👀
Record a short Telegram video circle showing where you are, what you’re doing, or what is happening around you.
en.circleRequestTitle:
Hi there! ✨

Could you record a short video circle right here, showing what’s happening around you right now?

We need this for our Documental Art project, so our documentalists don’t miss the miracles in your corner of the lab.

Thank you!🙂
en.collabMappingCaption:
Explore our Community Mapping Tool here 🌿
https://hosq.pages.dev/
en.collabNamePrompt: Type a real or artistic name 👀
en.collabNoResults:
No matches yet 🌙
Try changing your filters.
en.collabPickFilterType: What would you like to search by?
en.collabPrompt: Who or what are you looking for today? 🌿

Opening their profile ✨

en.dbError:

en.infoBody:
Notations brings together sound, performance, strange experiments, collective practices, and unexpected collaborations 🌿

Use the menu to explore the program, find collaborators, and stay in sync ✨
en.regAlreadyLinked:
This profile is already linked to another Telegram account 🥺
Please contact Uliana: @junully
en.regNoMatches:
I couldn’t find that name 💔
Try another spelling — or write to Uliana: @junully
en.regNotFoundFinal:
I can’t find you in the Notations database 💔
Please write to Uliana: @junully
en.regSuggestionsTitle: Please choose you name from the list: 🧚
en.sharePrompt:
Share anything that feels important right now 🌿
You can send us a thought, a photo, a voice message, a video, or a Telegram video circle.
en.shareThanks:
Thank you for sharing ✨
Your message has reached the Notations team.
en.unknownCmd:
Hmm, I don’t know this command 👀
Try /start
en.welcome:
Welcome to Notations '26 ✨
Here is your lab & festival companion: schedule, info, important notifications, and more! 🌿
